M1314_PRSR_ULCR_DEPTH M1314 Largest Pressure Ulcer Depth This field records the depth of the same pressure ulcer; from the visible surface to the deepest area. CHAR 4 x
M1320_STUS_PRBLM_PRSR_ULCR M1320 Status Of Most Problematic Pressure Ulcer This field indicates the status of the most problematic (observable) pressure ulcer. 00 = Newly epithelialized
01 = Fully granulating
02 = Early/partial granulation
03 = Not healing
NA = No observable pressure ulcer CHAR 2 x x x x
